name: geoseal-compile
description: Compile natural-language intent into a GeoSeal command plan (scbe_command_plan_v1)

name: geoseal-exec
description: Execute a pre-compiled command through the GeoSeal governance gate (max-tier ALLOW)

name: geoseal-seal
description: Seal a payload with a governance tier stamp

name: geoseal-explain-route
description: Explain the Sacred Tongue routing for a task or source file

name: geoseal-encode
description: Encode payload through Sacred Tongues transport

name: geoseal-verify
description: Verify a sealed GeoSeal payload

name: scbe-agentbus
description: Route task through the full SCBE Python agentbus (braid + dispatch)

name: scbe-antivirus
description: Run SCBE lightweight static safety scan on the current workspace

name: scbe-governance-fuse
description: Fuse AV/EDR/SIEM/runtime alerts into a single SCBE governance decision

name: scbe-runtime
description: Execute a task through the governed polyglot runtime

name: scbe-flow
description: Run doctrine-backed multi-agent flow planner for a task

name: scbe-tongues
description: Six-Tongues toolkit passthrough

name: scbe-cli-shell-bench
description: Run the SCBE CLI agent-json protocol benchmark (mock/model-independent harness checks)

name: scbe-cli-task-corpus
description: Run the SCBE CLI real task corpus with verifier-gated completion

name: scbe-cli-harness-matrix
description: Run SCBE CLI harness control matrix: protocol, offline scaffold corpus, and missing-model negative control

name: video-pocket-director
description: Run the SCBE video lattice pocket-dimension director demo through the local deterministic round-table harness

name: research-arxiv
description: Search arXiv preprints for papers matching a query. Free, no auth required. Returns titles, authors, abstract summaries, and URLs.

name: research-semantic-scholar
description: Search Semantic Scholar for academic papers with citation counts. Free, no auth required. Good for finding highly-cited work.

name: research-openalex
description: Search OpenAlex scholarly works index. Free, no auth required. Covers 250M+ works with open-access flag and citation counts.

name: research-crossref
description: Search CrossRef for DOI-registered publications. Free, no auth required. Best for finding official citations and publisher metadata.

name: research-pubmed
description: Search PubMed biomedical literature via NCBI E-utilities. Free, no auth required. Best for medical, biology, and life-sciences queries.

name: research-sam-gov
description: Search SAM.gov active federal contract and grant opportunities. Requires SAM_GOV_API_KEY env var. Returns NAICS, set-aside, close dates.

name: research-uspto
description: Search USPTO patent applications via the Open Data Portal File Wrapper API. Requires USPTO_ODP_API_KEY env var. Returns application numbers, status, inventors.

name: research-hf-models
description: Search HuggingFace model hub for models matching a query. Free; HF_TOKEN optional for higher rate limits. Returns model IDs, downloads, pipeline tags.

name: research-github-repos
description: Search GitHub public repositories by stars and relevance. GITHUB_TOKEN recommended for quota. Returns names, descriptions, stars, languages.
